a letter

para sa'yo, Mahal

To my Dearest Jelli,

Hello, Mahal. Happy 8th Monthsary po! ♡ I secretly prepared this gift for you. I just wanted to make our first-year monthsaries extra special because I realized how much celebrating them means to you. You're so special to me, Mahal. You're such a kind and thoughtful person. I want you to never give up on yourself, and please don't be too hard on yourself po. After everything you've been through, you deserve to be happy and to treat yourself with the same kindness you give to others. You are not hopeless, my love. I remember looking at you and seeing the kind of person you are, and how you handle things on your own. That's when I realized I had been admiring you all along. When I started paying attention to every little thing you said, when you became the first person I looked for, and when I found myself trying to make the group laugh just to see you smile—that's when I knew I was in love with you. I love you so much, Mahal ko. Thank you for being you. Happy 8th Monthsary po!

— always yours, Hobi
